message: Slow query detected — SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE user_id=? (duration=1240ms, threshold=200ms)
POST /pay — upstream DB latency elevated p99=1350ms (threshold=500ms)
Connection pool exhausted — pool_size=20, waiting=47, timeout after 5000ms
POST /pay 503 Service Unavailable — DB unreachable, rejecting request
Circuit breaker tripped OPEN — all /pay requests will fast-fail for 30s
POST /api/pay — upstream payment-service 502 Bad Gateway (circuit open)
FATAL: server process crashed — waiting for recovery, connections refused
Circuit breaker CLOSED — DB reconnected, normal traffic resuming
